name: Tuna Tataki
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fresh tuna loin without bloodlines.
2. Roll the tuna in cracked black pepper.
3. Sear the tuna in a very hot cast iron pan without using any oil.
4. Let it cool down for easier slicing.
5. Prepare the sauce: Combine 1 cup of peanut oil, 1 oz of sesame oil, 2 oz of soy sauce, 1/2 oz of grated garlic, 1/2 oz of grated ginger, and 5 spice powder to taste.
6. Slice the tuna very thinly.
7. Serve with the sauce drizzled on top and garnish with pickled ginger. A great appetizer.
